stemHtml: What is correct regarding the relationship between temperature and dew point?

options.a: The dew point is NOT affected when air is cooled to below this temperature (the dew point), at a constant pressure.
options.b: At a constant pressure, the dew point increases when the temperature increases.
options.c: The dew point varies inversely with the temperature at a constant pressure.
options.d: An increase in air temperature has NO effect on the dew point.
